item.title: JavaScript 数据结构：数组 Pt:1 | JavaScript Data Structure: Array Pt:1
item.description:
• 什么是数组
  • 数组用于
  • 创建数组
  • 使用数组
  • 结论

在网络上处理data时，有许多方法可以存储信息。 由于其广泛使用的methods ，它通常用作大多数数据结构的基础。 数组用来做什么？

对于Array ，我们希望确保存储的任何data都与其相似或有某种关系。 因此，如果我们有一个电影名称Array ，我们不想将音乐名称保留在同一个data集合中。 我们想创建一个单独的集合。

给出的例子

var movies = [ "incredibles", "toy story", "cars" ]; var artist = [ "James Brown", "Justin Timberlake", "Dadft Punk"]; var fruits = ["apples", "oranges", "pineapples"];

创建数组

我们有两种创建数组的方法，使用Array构造函数或使用[]方括号

数组构造器

var arr = new Array(); // we can initiate an array with the Array Constructor

方括号

var arr = []; // we can initiate an array with square brackets

使用数组

有许多方法可以操作Array 。 我们将深入探讨Array中最常用的method 。 工程师为我们创建了很多内置method供我们使用。

向数组添加元素

如果我们想在Array的末尾添加一个element ，我们可以使用Array启动后附带的内置methods之一。

基本语法

arr.push()

push()

 var arr = []; arr.push(2); arr.push(5); arr.push(25); console.log(arr) // output [2,5,25]

从数组中删除元素

基本语法

arr.pop()

 var arr [2,5,25] arr.pop(); console.log(arr) // output [2,5]

访问数组中的元素

如果我们想要访问数组中的元素，我们可以使用方括号表示法和我们想要检索的element的index 。

基本语法

arr.[0]

 var arr = [2,5,25] console.log(arr[0]) // 2 console.log(arr[1]) // 5 console.log(arr[2]) // 25

排序数组

如果我们想对Array中的elements进行排序，我们可以使用sort方法来实现。 默认情况下，元素按升序排列。 比较 UTF-16 代码单元值的序列。

arr.sort()

 var arr = [5,3,8,2,1,6,4]; arr.sort() console.log(arr)

反转数组

我们还可以就地反转Array并返回对同一个Array引用。

换句话说， Array是原始数组的镜像。

基本语法

arr.reverse()

 var arr = [5,3,8,2,1,6,4]; arr.reverse(); console.log(arr) // output [4, 6, 1, 2, 8, 3, 5]

从数组中检索某些元素

我们可以检索多个element ，而不是使用方括号表示法单独访问它。 使用slice方法，我们可以有一个起始索引和结束索引，它将返回Array元素的副本。 原始Array不会被操作。

基本语法

arr.slice(starting_index, ending_index)

 const myArray = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]; const extractedArray = myArray.slice(1, 4); // [2, 3, 4]

结论

到本文结束时，我希望您能看到Array数据结构在数据收集方面的强大功能。 这是 Javascript 编程语言中的主要关键概念之一，因为它是许多其他数据结构的主要基础。 就像我们将在整个系列中学习的Stack或Queue 。

💡 If we want to learn more about the other method s, check out the MDN Docs 💡 如果我们想了解更多关于其他method的信息，请查看MDN Docs



原文:
  • What is an Array
  • Arrays used for
  • Creating Array
  • Using Array
  • Conclusion

There are many ways to store information when working with data on the web. An Array is the simplest way to store a collection of data and exists in every programming language. It’s commonly used as a base for most data structures due to its widely used methods. An Array also contains two different types of values we are working with, which would be considered the element and then the assigned index number that is much referring to our element.

Array used for?

When it comes to an Array, we want to ensure that any data stored is similar or has some relationship with it. So if we have an Array of movie names, we wouldn’t want to keep music names in that same collection of data. We want to create a separate collection.

Example given

var movies = [ "incredibles", "toy story", "cars" ]; var artist = [ "James Brown", "Justin Timberlake", "Dadft Punk"]; var fruits = ["apples", "oranges", "pineapples"];

Creating an Array

We have two ways to create an array, using the Array constructor or using [] square brackets

Array constructor

var arr = new Array(); // we can initiate an array with the Array Constructor

Square brackets

var arr = []; // we can initiate an array with square brackets

Using Array

There are numerous ways to manipulate an Array. We will be diving into the most commonly used methods with the Array. There are tons of built-in methods that the engineers have created for us to use.

Adding an element to an Array

If we want to add an element to the end of our Array, we can use one of the built-in methods that come with the Array once initiated.

basic syntax

arr.push()

push()

var arr = []; arr.push(2);
arr.push(5);
arr.push(25); console.log(arr) // output [2,5,25]

Removing an element from an Array

The pop() method allows us to remove an element from the Array

basic syntax

arr.pop()

var arr [2,5,25] arr.pop(); console.log(arr) // output [2,5]

Accessing an element from an Array

If we wanted to access elements in an array, we could use the square bracket notation and the index of the element we want to retrieve.

basic syntax

arr.[0]

var arr = [2,5,25] console.log(arr[0]) // 2
console.log(arr[1]) // 5
console.log(arr[2]) // 25

Sorting an Array

If we wanted to sort our elements within an Array, we could do so with the sort method. By default, the elements are sorted out ascending. Comparing the sequence of UTF-16 code unit values.

arr.sort()

var arr = [5,3,8,2,1,6,4]; arr.sort() console.log(arr)

Reversing an Array

We can also reverse the Array in place and return a reference to the same Array .

In other words, the Array is mirrored to the original.

basic syntax

arr.reverse()

var arr = [5,3,8,2,1,6,4]; arr.reverse(); console.log(arr) // output [4, 6, 1, 2, 8, 3, 5]

💡 With these few methods, we can see the usefulness of the Array Data Structure and how helpful it can be in cases of manipulating data

Retrieving certain elements from an Array

We could retrieve more than one element instead of accessing it individually with the square bracket notation. Using the slice method, we can have a starting index & ending index that will return a copy of the Array elements. The original Array will not be manipulated.

basic syntax

arr.slice(starting_index, ending_index)

const myArray = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5];
const extractedArray = myArray.slice(1, 4); // [2, 3, 4]

Conclusion

By the end of this article, I hope you can see the power Array data structures have when it comes to data collection. This is one of the primary key concepts in the Javascript programming language, as it’s a primary basis for many other data structures. Like Stack or Queue which we will be learning about throughout this series.

💡 If we want to learn more about the other methods, check out the MDN Docs

item.title: 编码如何帮助提高孩子的沟通技巧 | How Coding can Help Enhance Your Child’s Communication Skills
item.description:
在 21 世纪的顶级技能中，编码排名靠前。 它不再被视为专供专业人士或专家使用的技能。 编码的好处是如此巨大，以至于如果我们希望他们能够在不断变化的环境中工作，那么它被认为是尽早灌输给孩子的基本技能之一。

通过这篇文章，我们将尝试解释：编码的含义、编码的好处以及儿童编码的用途。

编码可以定义为一种与计算机进行交流和发出指令的方式，以便它们按照我们希望的方式执行。 简单来说，这就是人类与计算机对话的方式。 编码通常被称为计算机编程语言。

过去几十年技术呈指数级增长，对一切功能产生了深远影响，编码也随着时间发生了变化。

它不再局限于用于创建网站和应用程序； 相反，它正在取代一切，从制造强大的机器到开关，从宇宙飞船到发电厂。 我们的日常生活中将会有更多的代码。 计算机和技术广泛应用于从农业到金融、教育到建筑的各个领域，这一事实证明了它已经变得多么重要。 以下是为孩子编写代码的一些好处：

儿童编码有助于清晰和逻辑思维
学习编码的好处，学生必须按特定顺序创建他们的程序，如果他们希望他们完成他们的目标或按预期发挥作用。 可以说逻辑是任何程序的基本组成部分。 因此，促进逻辑推理和清晰度。

儿童编码有助于协作
学习分组编码的孩子会获得可用于完成给定应用程序的各种方法的知识。 他们有能力考虑同行提供的价值和观点。 因此，这从小培养了共同的兴趣和归属感。

儿童编码有助于解决问题
在学习编码时，孩子们必须遵循一个程序才能实现他们的目标。 该过程包括定义问题和建立目标，然后是分析、决策制定、测试解决方案和调试。 因此，它有助于培养他们解决问题的能力，并保证他们能够做出明智的决定并反思他们之前的行为。

儿童编码有助于同理心
孩子们在小组学习时学会尊重他人的意见并关注他们的同龄人。 除了在需要时获得帮助外，他们还能够确定同伴的需求并在必要时提供帮助。

儿童编码有助于词汇
编码是一种语言，了解一种语言通常可以提高词汇量。 值得注意的是，学习编码不仅可以教授编程术语，还可以促进同伴之间的有效沟通。

因此，可以说编码课程可能教授的不仅仅是如何编写代码，而是开启了超乎想象的可能性。

他们设计的课程结构与孩子的年龄和潜力完全相关，确保他们获得适当的接触量。

这些课程在高度互动和个性化的一对一环境中提供，每个孩子都有机会立即消除任何疑虑。 针对儿童编程的 ALLEN Intellibrain 编码因强调实践经验并允许儿童开发代码来解决现实问题而脱颖而出。



原文:

Among the top 21st century skills, coding is ranked high. It is no longer seen as a skill that is exclusively appropriate for professionals or experts. Benefits of coding are so immense that it is counted as one of the essential skills to instill in kids as early as possible if we want them to be capable in a constantly changing environment.

Through this article we will try to explain: what is the meaning of coding, benefits of coding and uses of coding for kids.

Coding can be defined as a way to communicate and give instructions to computers inorder for them to perform in the way we want them to. To simplify, it is how humans are able to talk to computers. Coding is often known as computer programming language.

The exponential growth of technology over the last few decades has had a profound impact on how everything functions, and coding has also changed through time.

It is no longer limited to being used to create websites and apps; instead, it is replacing everything from making strong machines to switches, spaceships to power plants. There will be more code in our daily lives. The fact that computers and technology are widely used in every field, from agriculture to finance, education to construction, is evidence of how important it has become. The following are some of the benefits of coding for kids:

Coding for kids Helps in Clear and logical thinking
benefits of learning coding, students must create their programmes in a specific sequence if they want them to accomplish their goals or function as intended. One may say that logic is the fundamental building block of any programme. Thus, promoting logical reasoning and clarity.

Coding for kids Helps in Collaboration
Kids who learn to code in groups gain knowledge of the various methods that can be used to complete a given application. They get the ability to consider the worth and viewpoints that fellow peers provide. As a result, this fosters shared interests and a sense of belonging from an early age.

Coding for kids Helps in Problem Solving
When learning to code, kids must follow a procedure in order to achieve their goals. The process includes defining the issue and establishing the objective, followed by analysis, decision-making, testing the solution, and debugging. As a result, it aids in the development of their problem-solving abilities and guarantees that they are able to make wise decisions and reflect back on their previous actions.

Coding for kids Helps in Empathy
Kids learn to respect others' opinions and to be attentive to their fellow peers when they learn in groups. They are able to identify the needs of their peers and provide assistance when necessary, in addition to getting assistance when needed.

Coding for kids Helps in Vocabulary
Coding is a language, and knowing a language enhances vocabulary in general. It's noteworthy to observe that learning to code not only teaches programming terminology but also fosters effective communication amongst peers.

As a result, it can be said that coding courses may teach much more than just how to write code and open possibilities that are beyond imagination.

ALLEN Intellibrian has created one of the best online coding classes for kids in grades 1 to 8 (and above) in response to parents' growing recognition of the benefits of coding for kids. They have designed the course structure to be exactly linked with the age and potential of the kids, ensuring that they receive the appropriate amount of exposure.

The sessions are provided in a highly interactive and personalized 1-on-1 setting where every kid has the opportunity to clear any doubts immediately. The ALLEN Intellibrain coding for kids programmed stands out for emphasizing practical experience and allowing children to develop code to address real-world issues.

类型对于程序员来说是一个日常概念，但要简洁地定义它却出奇地困难。 我发现将 Set用作概念模型会很有帮助。

一个极其强大的打字稿功能是基于控制流的自动类型缩小。 这意味着变量在代码位置的任何特定点都有两种类型与之关联：声明类型和缩小类型。

Mark Smith

Posted on Feb 11

1 Think in {Set}

Type is an everyday concept to programmers, but it’s surprisingly difficult to define it succinctly. I find it helpful to use Set as a conceptual model instead.

#2 Understand declared type and narrowed type

One extremely powerful typescript feature is automatic type narrowing based on control flow. This means a variable has two types associated with it at any specific point of code location: a declaration type and a narrowed type.

#3 Use discriminated union instead of optional fields

...

item.title: UAT 工具在持续测试自动化中的作用 | The Role of UAT Tools in Continuous Test Automation
item.description:
介绍

您知道自动化测试很重要。 毕竟，您要确保在产品上线之前抓住所有问题。 您还听说过使用用户验收测试 UAT 工具可以帮助自动化您的 UAT 流程。 但是在持续测试自动化中使用 UAT 工具有什么好处呢？ 连续测试自动化是最有效的方法之一，而用户验收测试 (UAT) 工具是自动化测试过程的好方法。 这有助于您及早发现错误和故障，以免它们给您的客户带来问题

在本文中，我们将探讨在连续测试自动化中使用 UAT 工具的好处。

什么是 UAT 工具？

他们帮助 QA 团队和开发人员在将软件产品发布给客户之前识别并解决软件产品的问题。

它们还可用于测试整个应用程序或应用程序的特定部分。 它们可用于测试不同类型的输入，例如用户输入、数据输入或系统输入。

首先，它们可以帮助您更有效地管理自动化测试套件。 通过识别哪些测试通过，哪些测试失败，UAT 工具可以帮助您保持套件高效运行，并在错误成为问题之前捕获它们。

其次，UAT 工具可以帮助您自动化 UAT 过程。 这可以节省您的时间并确保您的测试每次都一致且准确地运行。

最后，UAT 工具可以帮助您生成有关测试状态的报告。 此信息可用于跟踪您的自动化工作是否成功并进行必要的调整。

在连续测试自动化中使用 UAT 工具有很多好处。 最重要的好处之一是它们可以帮助提高软件的质量。 通过使用 UAT 工具，您可以自动执行重复性任务，例如回归测试。 这意味着您可以将更多时间花在测试新功能上，而将更少时间花在不会为您的产品增加价值的任务上。

自动化重复性任务（例如回归测试）可以帮助您腾出时间，以便您可以专注于更重要的任务。 此外，自动化测试可以帮助您减少运行测试所需的资源数量。 这可以帮助您节省测试基础设施成本。

结论

简而言之，UAT 工具可以通过自动化测试流程为您节省时间和金钱。 通过持续的测试自动化，您可以增加测试覆盖率并加快反馈循环。 它是一个无代码平台，无需编程即可完成各种任务，例如错误跟踪、并行测试等。



原文:


Introduction

You know that automating your tests is important. After all, you want to make sure you’re catching every issue before your product goes live. You’ve also heard that using user acceptance testing UAT tools can help automate your UAT process. But what are the benefits of using UAT tools in continuous test automation? Continuous test automation is one of the most efficient ways to do this, and user acceptance testing (UAT) tools are a great way to automate your testing process. UAT tools allow you to easily create test cases and test scripts, and then run them against your applications automatically. This helps you to catch errors and glitches early on before they have a chance to cause problems for your customers

In this article, we’ll explore the benefits of using UAT tools in continuous test automation.

What Are UAT Tools?

UAT tools, or user acceptance testing tools, are specific software programs that are used to automate the testing process. They help QA teams and developers to identify and fix issues with software products before they are released to customers.

UAT tools can be used in a number of ways, but typically they are used to test new features or code changes. They can also be used to test entire applications or specific parts of an application. And they can be used to test different types of input, such as user input, data input, or system input.

How Can UAT Tools Help in Continuous Test Automation?

UAT tools can help in continuous test automation in multiple ways.

First, they can help you manage your automated test suite more effectively. By identifying which tests are passing and which ones are failing, UAT tools can help you keep your suite running efficiently and catch any errors before they become a problem.

Second, UAT tools can help you automate your UAT process. This can save you time and ensure that your tests are run consistently and accurately each time.

Finally, UAT tools can help you generate reports on the status of your tests. This information can be used to track the success of your automation efforts and make necessary adjustments.

UAT Tool Benefits

There are many benefits of using UAT tools in continuous test automation. One of the most important benefits is that they can help improve the quality of your software. UAT tools can also help save time and money.

UAT tools can help ensure that your software is of high quality because they can help you test your software more thoroughly. By using UAT tools, you can automate repetitive tasks such as regression testing. This means that you can spend more time testing new features and less time on tasks that do not add value to your product.

UAT tools can also help you save time and money. Automating repetitive tasks such as regression testing can help you free up time so that you can focus on more important tasks. In addition, automating your tests can help you reduce the number of resources required to run your tests. This can help you save money on test infrastructure costs.

Conclusion

In short, UAT tools can save you time and money by automating your testing process. By continuous test automation, you can increase your test coverage and speed up your feedback loop. UAT tools can also help you reduce false positives and improve your test accuracy. Opkey is a testing platform which helps various business to automate the testing. It is codeless platform where no programming is required to work on various tasks such as bug tracking, parallel testing, etc.

item.title: Replika AI：更全面地审视类人人工智能的未来 | Replika AI: A More Comprehensive Look at the Future of Human-Like AI
item.description:
拉金莫哈帕特拉

发表于 2 月 11 日

人工智能技术的最新进展导致像 Replika AI 这样的公司突破了可想象的极限。 一家名为 Replika AI 的企业专注于开发模仿人类智能的人工智能 (AI) 模型。 他们通过采用尖端方法复制各种认知功能，包括感知、决策和学习，开发可以与人自然互动的智能设备。

人工智能模型从人类谈话的集合中学习，并利用这些知识来理解人类的交流和思想。 因此，该模型可以对自然语言做出反应，理解上下文，甚至表达情绪。 此外，它使模型能够从每次遭遇中获取知识，随着时间的推移增强其理解力和有效性。

该公司断言，包括客户服务、教育和医疗保健在内的多个领域都可以从其 AI 模拟的使用中受益。 他们的技术被认为有可能显着改变 AI 的使用和查看方式，使其更容易为社会带来便利和优势。

其中一个例子是 Replika 的“专业”版本，它旨在成为个人 AI 伴侣，你可以像朋友一样与你的 AI 交谈，它会从你的谈话中学习，了解你并帮助你感到被理解。

另一个例子是 Replika for Business，它使用相同的技术来提供更加个性化和人性化的客户服务体验。

请记住，这是一个示例，您可能需要仔细检查帖子中提到的事实和数据。 此外，Replika AI 是一家真实的公司，您应该查看他们的网站和社交媒体以获取更多信息和更新。

参考： replika.com/

Lakin Mohapatra

Posted on Feb 11

Recent advancements in AI technology have led to companies like Replika AI pushing the envelope of what is conceivable. A business called Replika AI focuses on developing artificial intelligence (AI) models that mimic human intelligence. They develop intelligent devices that can interact with people naturally by employing cutting-edge approaches to duplicate various cognitive functions, including perception, decision-making, and learning.

The Replika AI's capacity to learn from encounters is one of its primary characteristics. The AI model learns from a collection of human talks and makes use of this knowledge to comprehend human communication and thought. As a result, the model can react to natural language, comprehend context, and even display emotions. Additionally, it enables the model to gain knowledge from every encounter, enhancing its comprehension and effectiveness over time.

There are many different ways that Replika AI might be used. The company asserts that a variety of fields, including customer service, education, and healthcare, can benefit from the usage of its AI mimics. Their technology is thought to have the potential to significantly alter how AI is utilised and viewed, making it more approachable and advantageous for society.

One example of this is Replika's "pro" version, which aims to be a personal AI companion, where you can talk to your AI like a friend, and it will learn from your conversations, get to know you and help you feel understood.

Another example is Replika for Business, which uses the same technology to provide a more personalized and human-like customer service experience.

item.title: 何时以及如何使用类？ | When and How to use Classes?
item.description:
丹尼斯姆万吉

发表于 2 月 11 日

讨论 Pytubedata 内容中的类

当我开始编写 Pytubedata 的初始版本时，我脑海中的主要目标是以一种易于扩展（扩展功能）和在后期阶段维护的方式构建代码。 我是怎么做到的？ 类。

很长一段时间，我不明白上课的真正目的。 无论我读了多少关于它们的资料，在我开始使用它们之前都很难掌握它们。 在本文中，我将通过 Pytubedata 中的示例分享我对类的理解。

定义需求
在编写任何代码之前，我们应该首先明确定义其功能和限制。 它会做什么和不会做什么，两者都很重要。 这就是我想让 Pytubedata 做的——

对 YouTube 数据 API 的公共端点进行 API 调用并返回响应。

要发出这些请求，它需要 4 个东西——基本 URL、端点、API 密钥和参数。

类及其成员
正如我所定义的，类是一个蓝图，主要将数据和函数（也称为类成员）放在一起。

基本 URL 和 API 密钥用于所有请求，因此将它们放在一起很有意义。 创建将这些数据放在一起的一流 api。

 class api: def __init__(self, key): self.base_url = "https://youtube.com/api/v3" self.key = key

这里的init函数是一个构造函数。 类是蓝图，蓝图是创建某物的通用模型。 您可以使用该蓝图创建多个实体。 构造函数的工作是在使用该类创建新实体时为变量赋值。 现在离开端点和参数。 一个 API 可以有多个端点，每个端点都有不同的参数。 因此，让我们为每个端点创建一个单独的类，并将端点和参数存储在一起。

 def Channel: def __init__(self): self.endpoint = "/channels" def get_channel(self, id, max_results): params = { "channelId": id, "part": snippet, "maxResults": max_results } return params

由于某些参数接受用户的输入，因此我们可以创建一个函数来将值分配给这些参数。

把它们放在一起 现在我们需要定义一个函数来进行 API 调用。 由于 api 类保存 API 调用的键和 base_url，我们将在同一个类中定义一个函数。 将所有数据结构化后，我们就可以进行 API 调用了。 但是等等，我们如何将所有这些数据放在一起？ 还记得构造函数讨论中的实体吗？

这些实体称为对象。 对象本质上是类的副本，我们可以根据需要制作任意数量的对象。 因此，当我们想要对通道端点进行 API 调用时，我们只需创建 Channel 类的对象即可。

 def request(self, channel_id, max_results): c = Channel(channel_id) # creating object of Channel Class requests.request( method="GET", url=self.base_url params=c.get_channel( id=channel_id, max_results=max_results ) )

现在主要代码

key = "123" client = api(key=key) client.request(channel_id="123", max_results=10)

封装
封装是使类与众不同的原因。

它扩展了类的持有功能，能够使用访问修饰符限制数据成员和函数对外部世界的访问。 这个概念的动机； 使用此代码的人可以通过使用可以破坏代码的对象访问它们来修改 key 或 base_url 的值。

 key = "123" client = api(key=key) client.key = "867" # value of key changed

存在 3 个访问修饰符：

民众

受保护

受保护的成员只能在类及其子类中访问（您将在继承中了解这些）
私人的

私有成员无法在类外的任何地方访问
为了防止恶意编码者破坏我们的代码，在我们的例子中，我们可以操纵端点、base_url 和 api_key 等变量，我们可以将这些变量设为私有。

在 Python 中，不存在访问修饰符的概念。 但是有一种技巧可以使用下划线 (_) 来模仿相同的行为。

您可以在变量前添加两个下划线，这将告诉 Python 这些成员是私有的，不能在类外访问。

 import requests class api: def __init__(self, key): # data members self.__base_url = "https://youtube.com/api/v3" self.__key = key # method to make API call def request(self, channel_id, max_results): requests.request( method="GET", url=self.base_url params= # how do I put params here? )
 key = "123" client = api(key=key) client.__key = "abc"

现在这将给出一个错误，因为 __key 是一个私有变量并且不能在类之外访问。

使用私有变量的一个缺点是现在用户甚至无法查看私有变量的值，这有时会成为一个问题。 例如，这里有人可能想查看 __key 的值以及是否为它分配了正确的值。 我们可以在类中定义一个公共函数，它将返回 __key 的值。

 def get_key(self): return self.__key

既然你已经理解了封装，我想重新定义类定义——

类是一个蓝图，主要将数据和函数（也称为类的成员）封装在一起。

让我们总结一下本文中涵盖的概念 -

班级

构造器

对象

封装

这是类最基本的功能。 从这里开始，更多内容已添加到类中，但那是针对另一个博客的。 在那之前，请查看 Python 中的 getter 和 setter。

开个玩笑，这是个人喜好。 但是你可以在你的设置中更改你的主题、字体等。

你懂得越多。 一旦被暂停，denis_ke 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，denis_ke 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，denis_ke 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 denis_ke 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 denis_ke 的方法：

降低 denis_ke 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 denis_ke 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

dennis mwangi

Posted on Feb 11

Discussing classes in content of Pytubedata

When I started writing the initial version of Pytubedata, the primary goal in my mind was to structure the code in a way that would be easy to scale (extending functionalities) and maintain in later stages. How did I do it? Classes.

I, for a long time, didn't understand the real purpose of classes. However much I read about them, they were hard to grasp until I started using them. In this article, I will share my understanding of Classes with examples from Pytubedata.

Define the requirements
Before writing any piece of code, we should first explicitly define its functionalities and its limitations. What it will do and what it will not do, both are important. This was what I wanted Pytubedata to do-

Make an API call to public endpoints of YouTube Data API and return the response.

To make those requests it needs 4 things- base URL, endpoint, API key, and parameters.

Class and its Members
A class, as I would define it, is a blueprint that primarily holds data and functions, also called members of the class, together.

The base URL and API key are used in all requests, so it makes sense to keep them together. Creating the first class api that would hold this data together.

class api: def __init__(self, key): self.base_url = "https://youtube.com/api/v3" self.key = key

The init function here is a constructor. A class is a blueprint, and a blueprint is a general model to create something. You can create multiple entities using that blueprint. A constructor's job is to assign values to variables whenever a new entity is created using that class. (more on entities below)

Now left the endpoint and parameters. An API can have many endpoints and each endpoint will have different parameters. So let's create a separate class for each endpoint and store the endpoint and the parameters together.

def Channel: def __init__(self): self.endpoint = "/channels" def get_channel(self, id, max_results): params = { "channelId": id, "part": snippet, "maxResults": max_results } return params

Since some parameters take the user's input so we can create a function to assign the value to those parameters.

Put it all together Now we need to define a function that will make the API calls. Since the api class holds the key and base_url for the API call, we will define a function in the same class. (Note: now the class is holding data and function that use that data together)

import requests class api: def __init__(self, key): # data members
 self.base_url = "https://youtube.com/api/v3" self.key = key # method to make API call
 def request(self, channel_id, max_results): requests.request( method="GET", url=self.base_url params= # how do I put params here?
 )

Having all the data structured now we are ready to make an API call. But wait, how are we gonna put all this data together? Remember entities from the constructor discussion?

Those entities are called objects. Objects are essentially copies of a class and we can make as many as you want of them. So when we want to make an API call to the channel endpoint we can just create the object of Channel class.

 def request(self, channel_id, max_results): c = Channel(channel_id) # creating object of Channel Class
 requests.request( method="GET", url=self.base_url params=c.get_channel( id=channel_id, max_results=max_results ) )

Now the main code

key = "123"
client = api(key=key) client.request(channel_id="123", max_results=10)

Encapsulation
Encapsulation is what makes a class special.

It extends the holding functionality of the class with the ability to restrict access of data members and functions to the outside world using access modifiers. A motivation for this concept; someone using this code can modify the value of key or base_url by accessing them using objects which can break the code.

key = "123"
client = api(key=key) client.key = "867" # value of key changed

There exist 3 access modifiers:

Public

Public is the default access modifier and, as the name suggests, anyone can access the public members of a class using the object
Protected

Protected members can be accessed only within the class and its child classes (You will learn about these in Inheritance)
Private

Private members cannot be accessed anywhere outside the class
To prevent malicious coders from breaking our code, in our case manipulating variables like endpoint, base_url, and api_key we can make these variables Private.

In Python, there doesn't exist the concept of access modifiers. But there is a hack to mimic the same behavior using underscore (_).

You can add two underscores before a variable, which will tell Python that those members are private and not to be given access outside the class.

import requests class api: def __init__(self, key): # data members
 self.__base_url = "https://youtube.com/api/v3" self.__key = key # method to make API call
 def request(self, channel_id, max_results): requests.request( method="GET", url=self.base_url params= # how do I put params here?
 )


key = "123"
client = api(key=key) client.__key = "abc"

Now this will give an error since __key is a private variable and cannot be accessed outside the class.

One shortcoming of using private variables is that now the user won't even be able to peek at the values of the private variables, which can be an issue sometimes. For eg, here one might wanna look at the value of __key and if it is assigned the right value. We can just define a Public function, that will return the value of __key , within the class.

def get_key(self): return self.__key

Now that you have understood encapsulation, I would like to redefine the class definition-

A class is a blueprint that primarily encapsulates data and functions, also called members of the class, together.

Let's summarize the concepts we have covered in this article-

Classes

Constructors

Objects

Encapsulation

This is the most basic functionality of classes. From here, a lot more has been added to classes but that's for another blog. Until then, check out getter and setter in Python.

Just kidding, it's a personal preference. But you can change your theme, font, etc. in your settings.

The more you know. 🌈

shrey vijayvargiya - Feb 9

Adam Mateusz Brożyński - Jan 29

item.title: 阿德斯利到怀特普莱恩斯机场汽车服务 | Ardsley to white Plains Airport Car Service
item.description:
阿德斯利到怀特普莱恩斯机场汽车服务：综合指南

介绍：

阿德斯利机场到怀特普莱恩斯机场是寻求便捷、无压力交通方式的旅客的热门路线。 随着众多阿兹利到纽瓦克机场服务选项可用，选择合适的专车服务可能是一项艰巨的任务。 本指南将为您提供做出明智决定所需的所有信息。

汽车服务类型：

从阿兹利到怀特普莱恩斯机场的路线提供多种类型的汽车服务，包括：

出租车：

出租车是一种广泛使用的传统交通方式。 但是，它们可能比其他选择更贵，而且可能无法保证乘车。

拼车服务：Uber 和 Lyft 等拼车服务是旅行者的热门选择。 他们提供方便、实惠且灵活的选择，但在高峰时段等待时间可能会更长。

豪华轿车服务：豪华轿车服务为那些寻求更舒适和高端体验的人提供了一种奢华的选择。 此选项通常比其他汽车服务更贵，但由于所提供的额外舒适性和便利设施而物有所值。

需要考虑的因素：

选择汽车服务时，需要考虑几个因素，包括：

价格：选择汽车服务时，成本是一个重要的考虑因素。 比较不同服务之间的价格以找到最划算的交易非常重要。

可用性：确保您选择的专车服务在您需要时可用。 某些汽车服务在高峰时段或节假日的可用性可能有限。

舒适度和便利设施：考虑您在乘车过程中想要的舒适度和便利设施水平。 例如，一些汽车服务提供额外的伸腿空间、Wi-Fi 和充电端口。

司机体验：选择由经验丰富的司机提供的专车服务，他们知道从阿兹利到怀特普莱恩斯机场的路线。 这将确保安全和平稳的行驶。

客户服务：良好的客户服务对于无压力体验很重要。 寻找在提供卓越客户服务方面拥有良好记录的汽车服务。

结论：

总之，为阿兹利到怀特普莱恩斯机场路线选择合适的专车服务是一个重要的决定。 通过考虑不同类型的可用服务和对您重要的因素，您可以找到满足您需求的最佳选择。 无论您是在寻找经济实惠、舒适还是高端的体验，总有一款专车服务适合您。



原文:

Ardsley to White Plains Airport Car Service: A Comprehensive Guide

Introduction:

Ardsley to White Plains Airport is a popular route for travelers who are looking for a convenient and stress-free mode of transportation. With numerous Ardsley to Newark Airport Service options available, choosing the right car service can be a daunting task. This guide will provide you with all the information you need to make an informed decision.

Types of Car Services:

There are several types of car services available for the Ardsley to White Plains Airport route, including:

Taxis:

Taxis are a traditional mode of transportation that is widely available. However, they can be more expensive than other options and may not offer a guaranteed ride.

Ridesharing Services: Ridesharing services such as Uber and Lyft are a popular choice for travelers. They offer a convenient, affordable, and flexible option, but wait times can be longer during peak hours.

Limousine Services: Limousine services provide a luxury option for those looking for a more comfortable and high-end experience. This option is typically more expensive than other car services but is worth it for the extra comfort and amenities offered.

Factors to Consider:

When choosing a car service, there are several factors to consider, including:

Price: Cost is an important consideration when selecting a car service. It is important to compare prices between different services to find the best deal.

Availability: Make sure that the car service you choose is available at the time you need it. Some car services may have limited availability during peak hours or holidays.

Comfort and Amenities: Consider the level of comfort and amenities you want during your ride. For example, some car services offer extra legroom, Wi-Fi, and charging ports.

Driver Experience: Choose a car service with experienced drivers who know the route from Ardsley to White Plains Airport. This will ensure a safe and smooth ride.

Customer Service: Good customer service is important for a stress-free experience. Look for a car service that has a proven track record of providing excellent customer service.

Conclusion:

In conclusion, choosing the right car service for the Ardsley to White Plains Airport route is an important decision. By considering the different types of services available and the factors that are important to you, you can find the best option to meet your needs. Whether you are looking for a cost-effective, comfortable, or high-end experience, there is a car service that is right for you.

item.title: 连接到 GitHub 和获取搜索结果的 Python 脚本 | A Python Script to connect to GitHub and Fetches Search Results
item.description:
阿吉特·辛格·雷纳

发表于 2 月 11 日

它允许开发人员以编程方式访问平台的各个方面，例如管理存储库、管理用户和管理问题。

可以使用个人访问令牌、OAuth2 或基本身份验证来完成身份验证。 此外，还有许多以不同编程语言提供的客户端库，这使得与 API 的集成变得更加容易，并减少了您需要编写的代码量。

以下是从 GitHub 获取搜索结果的示例 Python 脚本。 请注意，您将需要个人帐户令牌才能使其正常工作：

 import requests import json url = "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=docker+desktop+extension&sort=stars&order=desc" headers = { "Authorization": "github_pat_XXXX" } response = requests.get(url, headers=headers) if response.status_code == 200: data = json.loads(response.text) for repository in data["items"]: print(f"{repository['name']}: {repository['html_url']}") else: print("Could not retrieve data from GitHub.")

在此脚本中，您需要替换为实际的 GitHub 个人访问令牌。 令牌作为授权标头在请求标头中传递。 这允许脚本访问您的 GitHub 帐户中受保护的资源，例如搜索存储库。

获取每个存储库的链接并将其与存储库名称一起添加到输出中，以冒号 (:) 分隔。

原文:

Ajeet Singh Raina

Posted on Feb 11

The GitHub API is a RESTful API for interacting with the GitHub platform. It allows developers to programmatically access various aspects of the platform, such as managing repositories, managing users, and managing issues.

The API supports a variety of methods for creating, retrieving, updating, and deleting resources, making it a powerful tool for automating various tasks and integrating with other systems. The API requires authentication for all methods except for those that are publicly accessible. The authentication can be done using a personal access token, OAuth2, or with basic authentication. GitHub provides extensive documentation for its API, making it easy to get started and use.

Additionally, there are many client libraries available in different programming languages, which makes it easier to integrate with the API and reduces the amount of code you need to write.

Here is a sample Python script that fetches search results from GitHub. Please note that you will require Personal Account Token to get it working:

import requests
import json

url = "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=docker+desktop+extension&sort=stars&order=desc"

headers = {
    "Authorization": "github_pat_XXXX"
}

response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)

if response.status_code == 200:
    data = json.loads(response.text)
    for repository in data["items"]:
        print(f"{repository['name']}: {repository['html_url']}")
else:
    print("Could not retrieve data from GitHub.")

In this script, you'll need to replace with your actual GitHub personal access token. The token is passed in the request headers as an Authorization header. This allows the script to access protected resources in your GitHub account, such as searching for repositories.

The link to each repository is fetched and added to the output along with the repository name, separated by a colon (:).
